name: Calendar
description: Base component for custom date pickers
searchText: calendar base component for custom date pickers @mantine/dates /dates/calendar arialabels columnstoscroll date decadelabelformat defaultdate defaultlevel enablekeyboardnavigation excludedate firstdayofweek fullwidth getdayarialabel getdayprops getmonthcontrolprops getyearcontrolprops headercontrolsorder hideoutsidedates hideweekdays highlighttoday level locale maxdate maxlevel mindate minlevel monthlabelformat monthslistformat nexticon nextlabel numberofcolumns ondatechange onlevelchange onmonthmouseenter onmonthselect onnextdecade onnextmonth onnextyear onpreviousdecade onpreviousmonth onpreviousyear onyearmouseenter onyearselect previousicon previouslabel renderday size static weekdayformat weekenddays withcellspacing withweeknumbers yearlabelformat yearslistformat

props.name: ariaLabels
props.description: aria-label attributes for controls on different levels

props.name: columnsToScroll
props.description: Number of columns to scroll with next/prev buttons, same as numberOfColumns if not set explicitly

props.name: date
props.description: Displayed date in controlled mode

props.name: decadeLabelFormat
props.description: dayjs format for decade label or a function that returns decade label based on the date value

props.name: defaultDate
props.description: Initial displayed date in uncontrolled mode

props.name: defaultLevel
props.description: Initial displayed level in uncontrolled mode

props.name: enableKeyboardNavigation
props.description: Enable enhanced keyboard navigation (Ctrl/Cmd + Arrow keys for year navigation, Ctrl/Cmd + Shift + Arrow keys for decade navigation, Y key to open year view)

props.name: excludeDate
props.description: Callback function to determine whether the day should be disabled

props.name: firstDayOfWeek
props.description: Number 0-6, where 0 – Sunday and 6 – Saturday.

props.name: fullWidth
props.description: Determines whether the list should take the full width of its container

props.name: getDayAriaLabel
props.description: Assigns aria-label to Day components based on date

props.name: getDayProps
props.description: Passes props down to Day components

props.name: getMonthControlProps
props.description: Passes props down month picker control

props.name: getYearControlProps
props.description: Passes props down to year picker control based on date

props.name: headerControlsOrder
props.description: Controls order

props.name: hideOutsideDates
props.description: Determines whether outside dates should be hidden

props.name: hideWeekdays
props.description: Determines whether weekdays row should be hidden

props.name: highlightToday
props.description: Determines whether today should be highlighted with a border

props.name: level
props.description: Current displayed level displayed in controlled mode

props.name: locale
props.description: Dayjs locale, defaults to value defined in DatesProvider

props.name: maxDate
props.description: Maximum possible date in YYYY-MM-DD format or Date object

props.name: maxLevel
props.description: Max level that user can go up to (decade, year, month)

props.name: minDate
props.description: Minimum possible date in YYYY-MM-DD format or Date object

props.name: minLevel
props.description: Min level that user can go down to (decade, year, month)

props.name: monthLabelFormat
props.description: dayjs label format to display month label or a function that returns month label based on month value

props.name: monthsListFormat
props.description: dayjs format for months list

props.name: nextIcon
props.description: Change next icon

props.name: nextLabel
props.description: Next button aria-label

props.name: numberOfColumns
props.description: Number of columns displayed next to each other

props.name: onDateChange
props.description: Called when date changes

props.name: onLevelChange
props.description: Called when level changes

props.name: onMonthMouseEnter
props.description: Called when mouse enters month control

props.name: onMonthSelect
props.description: Called when user selects month

props.name: onNextDecade
props.description: Called when the next decade button is clicked

props.name: onNextMonth
props.description: Called when the next month button is clicked

props.name: onNextYear
props.description: Called when the next year button is clicked

props.name: onPreviousDecade
props.description: Called when the previous decade button is clicked

props.name: onPreviousMonth
props.description: Called when the previous month button is clicked

props.name: onPreviousYear
props.description: Called when the previous year button is clicked

props.name: onYearMouseEnter
props.description: Called when mouse enters year control

props.name: onYearSelect
props.description: Called when user selects year

props.name: previousIcon
props.description: Change previous icon

props.name: previousLabel
props.description: Previous button aria-label

props.name: renderDay
props.description: Controls day value rendering

props.name: size
props.description: Component size

props.name: static
props.description: Determines whether days should be static, static days can be used to display month if it is not expected that user will interact with the component in any way

props.name: weekdayFormat
props.description: dayjs format for weekdays names

props.name: weekendDays
props.description: Indices of weekend days, 0-6, where 0 is Sunday and 6 is Saturday. The default value is defined by DatesProvider.

props.name: withCellSpacing
props.description: Determines whether controls should be separated

props.name: withWeekNumbers
props.description: Determines whether week numbers should be displayed

props.name: yearLabelFormat
props.description: dayjs label format to display year label or a function that returns year label based on year value

props.name: yearsListFormat
props.description: dayjs format for years list
